description: Create a new Grouped Product in Magento for a fitness bundle named 'Home Gym Starter Kit' (SKU: 'HOMEGYM-KIT-001'). Configure the product as Enabled with Visibility set to Catalog, Search, and assign it to the 'Sports' category. The group must include the following products: 'YOGA-001' (Yoga Mat Premium) with a default quantity of 1, 'BOTTLE-001' (Insulated Water Bottle) with a default quantity of 2, and 'TSHIRT-001' (Classic Cotton T-Shirt) with a default quantity of 1. If prompted, log in using admin / Admin1234!.
